description: A sly long-snouted mechanical wolf riding a worn red vintage motorcycle.

idle.notes: Low-distraction bike idle with tiny eye shifts, slight chest bob, and ready-to-go posture.

walk.notes: Directional riding rows for true right-facing and left-facing motorcycle travel.

curious.notes: Alert scanning look while staying seated on the motorcycle and holding the bars.

happy.notes: Smug pleased loop with a tiny throttle flourish instead of a literal wave.

sleep.notes: Drowsy roadside rest with drooping eyelids and a relaxed lean onto the handlebars.

active.notes: Compact rev/coast support loop with slight chassis vibration and engine bounce.

hop.notes: Small controlled wheelie sequence, preserving rider-bike unity.

brake_support.notes: Controlled brake-and-slump support loop; no crash or disassembly.

drag.notes: Directional drag reuses the true-facing ride rows.

rev.notes: Mapped to the non-directional rev/coast support loop.

coast.notes: Shares the same non-directional support row as rev because the fixed atlas has no extra dedicated coast row.

brake.notes: Mapped to the brake-and-slump support loop in the fixed atlas.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses the true left-facing ride row
right drag uses the true right-facing ride row
ride_left and ride_right are not swapped
wolf muzzle, handlebars, headlamp, tank, and wheel orientation agree with the travel direction
Rex remains readable at small size as a long-snouted wolf riding a worn vintage red motorcycle
